---
title: "Part 6: Constraints and Mappings"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

[Back to regularizeNd series home](index.qmd)

[Previous: Part 5](part-05-scaling-to-4d-and-beyond.qmd)

This part shows constrained regularization workflows, including monotonic constraints and mapped variable spaces.

## Practical Goal

- Build a constrained least-squares system using matrix outputs.
- Apply monotonic constraints in selected dimensions.
- Understand when mapped coordinates improve model behavior.

## Example Anchor

Primary script: `regularizeNd/Examples/constraint_and_Mapping_Example.m`

## Suggested Walkthrough

1. Assemble fidelity and regularization matrices.
2. Build inequality constraints with `monotonicConstraint`.
3. Solve constrained system and reshape to grid.
4. Compare constrained and unconstrained results.

## Attribution

This educational progression is inspired by Peter Goldstein's regularization articles and related prior tools.

## Next

[Part 7: Iterative Solvers and Memory Strategy](part-07-iterative-solvers-and-memory-strategy.qmd)
